commit.message:
fix(deps): rollback @heroui/react to v2 line and pin against major bumps (#469)

Dependabot PR #465 bumped @heroui/react 2.8.9 -> 3.1.0 and
tailwind-variants 1.0.0 -> 3.2.2 (both major), which broke the
Vercel deployment (#469). HeroUI v3 is a full rewrite that is
incompatible with the current v2-based component code.

Changes:
- @heroui/react: 3.2.1 -> ^2.8.10 (latest v2 patch)
- tailwind-variants: 3.2.2 -> ^1.0.0 (v1 line)
- Use caret ranges so future patch/minor updates still flow in,
  while dependabot ignore rules block major bumps
- dependabot.yml: ignore version-update:semver-major for @heroui/*
  to prevent a repeat of the accidental v3 upgrade. Remove this
  ignore entry once the v2 -> v3 migration is intentionally done.

Verified: bun run build + bun run lint pass.

Refs: #469

commit.message: fix(docker): move db persistence out of /app to prevent wrangler hot-reload watch loops
feat(player): implement auto-retry mechanism on playback failure by forcing cache bypass and refresh
fix(proxy): disable caching for audio URL queries (types=url) to prevent expired audio link issues
fix(docker): add init: true to ensure container responds to SIGTERM and stops gracefully
docs: simplify docker deployment section by keeping only generic config
feat: refactor Docker deploy to wrangler mode, fix local vars and update README

feat(docker): 独立 Node.js 服务器，彻底脱离 Wrangler/Cloudflare 依赖

- 新增 server/ 目录：纯 Express.js 后端，完全独立运行
- server/index.js: Express 主入口，路由结构与 Cloudflare Pages 完全一致
- server/db.js: 使用 Node.js 22.5+ 内置 node:sqlite 替代 Cloudflare D1
- server/cache.js: 内存 TTL 缓存替代 caches.default（proxy 缓存 5min，palette 缓存 1h）
- server/routes/proxy.js: 代理接口，保留 Cache HIT/MISS 日志和缓存逻辑
- server/routes/palette.js: 调色板分析，颜色算法原样移植，去掉 CF 专有 fetch 选项
- server/routes/storage.js: 存储接口，GET/POST/DELETE 完整移植
- server/routes/auth.js: 认证中间件，cookie 验证逻辑与 Cloudflare 版完全一致
- server/routes/login.js: 登录接口移植
- Dockerfile: 去掉 wrangler，改为 node --experimental-sqlite server/index.js
- Cloudflare Pages 版本（functions/）完全不受影响
Fix S3 uploads with special characters
Update hitokoto data and rules [skip ci]
